candidate_problem_record.subject: physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The current-voltage characteristic of the output terminals A, B (Fig. 3.3) is the same as that of a battery of emf $\varepsilon_{0}$ and internal resistance $r$. Find the short-circuit current provided by the battery.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。
